title: ProDec Contractor 7 Piece Foam 4 inch Mini Paint Rollers, Frame and Tray Set for Painting with Gloss and Satin Paints on Skirting Boards, Window Sills, Panel Doors, Cabinets, Metal and More, 4"
features: 5x medium density foam mini rollers ideal for gloss, satin, undercoat and primer
Applies paint quicker than a brush for fast, efficient coverage and no brush marks
4" size ideal for skirting boards, window sills, panel doors, metalwork and more
Black mini tray made from 100% recycled plastic
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Is this the right roller for me? In a nutshell Foam mini rollers are widely used by professionals on wood and metal in preference to brushes as they enable faster, more efficient coverage with no brush marks. This medium density foam is a great choice for skirting boards, window sills, doors and panels. If you want the very highest trade quality finish, try ProDec's high density foam rollers. Useful to know Ideal for both water- and solvent/oil-based paints. Lint-free so it can be used straight from the bag without pre-washing. For more product information see the bottom section. What to use and where PAINTS: Gloss, Satin, Undercoat, Primer SURFACES: Wood, Metal FRAME: Fits all standard mini roller frames Applying Gloss & Satin paints by mini roller ProDec has a choice of trade quality mini roller fabrics to help you achieve a high quality finish with gloss and satin paints. Use this guide to help you make the right choice. Foam Trade grade high density foam with small cells designed to avoid any air pockets, eliminating bubbles in the paint that could otherwise spoil the finish. The foam absorbs paint, releasing it gradually through each roll and giving even surface coverage for less working out and improved efficiency. Mohair High quality, solvent-resistant woven synthetic fabric that is more durable than foam. The pile is cut to 5mm, ensuring the optimum film thickness is applied, giving excellent coverage without the risk of the paint film skinning. Short pile microfibre The softest fabric of all, giving a very light touch and less roller texture in the paint film. Microfibre absorbs the paint inside the fibres, instead of it just sitting between them, meaning that it both loads more smoothly and releases the paint more evenly throughout the stroke, requiring less working out and increasing your painting efficiency. Ensure you select the 6mm short pile, not the 12mm medium pile version. Flocked foam Very short flock fibres which are electrostatically coated onto a high density foam body, giving a very short pile roller that leaves no texture in the paint film. Flock gives the ultimate mirror-smooth finish - ideal for high gloss paints. More information on this product Offering excellent value for money, these medium density foam rollers are suitable for applying water- and solvent/oil-based gloss and satin paints as well as undercoat and primer on skirting boards, window sills, panel doors, metalwork and more, giving a good finish with minimal roller texture. The set is completed with a 26cm long push fit mini roller frame and a black mini tray made from 100% recycled plastic.
